question: In the last year shown, what can be concluded about which segment has the largest share?

options.A: The red area represents the segment with the largest share.
options.B: The green area represents the segment with the largest share.
options.C: Cannot determine which specific segment has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.D: All segments have an equal share.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
